content.html:
Scope

Short-horizon electricity load forecasting workflow for German demand signals with reproducible training and automated inference.

items: Architected containerized MLOps infrastructure → Docker Compose and FastAPI microservices.
Orchestrated automated data pipelines → Airflow (ingestion, preprocessing, feature marts via SQL).
Enforced reproducibility and dataset versioning → DVC across pipeline workflows.
Developed secure API layer → JWT authentication, RBAC, and automated testing (Pytest).
Deployed observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana) → custom alerting rules and health dashboards.

items.alt: Conceptual Workflow of a German-Load-Forecast-MLOps System
